Functions to open and close an app message receiver with a specified buffer size.

# Purpose
This header file declares functions for managing a message receiver in an application. The function [`app_message_receiver_open`](<#app_message_receiver_open>) initializes the message receiver with a specified buffer size and returns a boolean indicating success or failure. The function [`app_message_receiver_close`](<#app_message_receiver_close>) terminates the message receiver. The file includes standard headers `stdbool.h` and `stddef.h` to use the `bool` type and `size_t` type, respectively.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
- `stddef.h`
